queries.name: one_hop
queries.cypher: MATCH (a:Node)-[:EDGE*1..1]->(b:Node) WHERE a.id = 1 RETURN b.id ORDER BY b.id

queries.name: two_hop
queries.cypher: MATCH (a:Node)-[:EDGE*1..2]->(b:Node) WHERE a.id = 1 RETURN DISTINCT b.id ORDER BY b.id

queries.name: three_hop
queries.cypher: MATCH (a:Node)-[:EDGE*1..3]->(b:Node) WHERE a.id = 1 RETURN DISTINCT b.id ORDER BY b.id

queries.name: exact_two_hop
queries.cypher: MATCH (a:Node)-[:EDGE*2..2]->(b:Node) WHERE a.id = 1 RETURN DISTINCT b.id ORDER BY b.id

queries.name: reachable_from_2
queries.cypher: MATCH (a:Node)-[:EDGE*1..4]->(b:Node) WHERE a.id = 2 RETURN DISTINCT b.id ORDER BY b.id

queries.name: count_reachable_from_1
queries.cypher: MATCH (a:Node)-[:EDGE*1..4]->(b:Node) WHERE a.id = 1 RETURN COUNT(DISTINCT b.id) AS cnt
